have h1 : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ ≤ ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T := by
    have h2 : σ₁ ≤ 1 := by
      cases' hσ₁ with hσ₁a hσ₁b
      linarith
    have h3 : σ₁ ≥ 5 / 8 := by
      cases' hσ₁ with hσ₁a hσ₁b
      linarith
    have h4 : σ₂ > σ₁ := by
      cases' hσ₂ with hσ₂a hσ₂b
      linarith
    have h5 : σ₂ ≤ 1 := by
      cases' hσ₂ with hσ₂a hσ₂b
      linarith
    have h6 : T ≥ I.H₀ := hT
    -- Use the fact that B₀ is a bound on the number of zeros in certain regions to prove the inequality.
    -- The detailed proof would involve using the properties of the Riemann zeta function and its zeros,
    -- but for the sake of brevity, we are directly using the given bound ε₃.
    norm_num [riemannZeta.Sigma, ε₃] at *
    <;>
    (try
      norm_num at *) <;>
    (try
      linarith) <;>
    (try
      nlinarith) <;>
    (try
      linarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2]) <;>
    (try
      nlinarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2]) <;>
    (try
      linarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2, hT]) <;>
    (try
      nlinarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2, hT]) <;>
    (try
      linarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2, hT]) <;>
    (try
      nlinarith [hσ₁.1, hσ₁.2, hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2, hT])
  exact h1

have h_main : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ ≤ ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T := by
    have h₁ : σ₁ ≥ 5 / 8 := by
      exact hσ₁.1
    have h₂ : σ₁ ≤ 1 := by
      exact hσ₁.2
    have h₃ : σ₂ > σ₁ := by
      exact hσ₂.1
    have h₄ : σ₂ ≤ 1 := by
      exact hσ₂.2
    have h₅ : Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂ ⊆ I.ZDB.σ_range := hσ
    -- Use the fact that Sigma{T}x{σ₁}{σ₂} is zero when T is sufficiently small
    have h₆ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ = 0 := by
      -- Prove that Sigma{T}x{σ₁}{σ₂} = 0 under the given conditions
      have h₆₁ : T ≥ I.H₀ := hT
      have h₆₂ : riemannZeta.N' σ₁ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₁) = 0 := by
        apply riemannZeta.Hσ_zeroes
        <;> simp_all [Inputs.hH₀, Inputs.hR]
      have h₆₃ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ = 0 := by
        -- Use the fact that there are no zeros in the region to show the sum is zero
        simp [riemannZeta.Sigma, h₆₂]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try simp_all [Set.Icc, Set.Ioc]) <;>
        (try nlinarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            aesop
          })
      exact h₆₃
    -- Prove that ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T is non-negative
    have h₇ : ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T ≥ 0 := by
      -- Prove that ε₃ is non-negative
      simp only [ε₃]
      positivity
    -- Combine the results to get the final inequality
    linarith
  exact h_main

have h_main : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ ≤ ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T := by
    have h₁ : (ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T : ℝ) = 2 * x ^ (-(1 - σ₁) + (σ₂ - σ₁) / N) * (I.B₀ σ₁ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₁) T) + 2 * x ^ (1 - σ₁) * (1 - x ^ (-(σ₂ - σ₁) / N)) * ∑ n in Finset.Ico 1 N, (I.B₀ (σn σ₁ σ₂ n N) (Hn I.H₀ I.R σ₁ σ₂ n N) T) * x ^ ((σ₂ - σ₁) * (n + 1) / N) := by
      rfl
    rw [h₁]
    have h₂ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ = 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ => x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) := by
      simp [riemannZeta.Sigma]
      <;>
      simp_all [Set.Ico, Set.Ioc, Set.Ioo]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    rw [h₂]
    have h₃ : 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ => x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im) ≤ 2 * x ^ (-(1 - σ₁) + (σ₂ - σ₁) / N) * (I.B₀ σ₁ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₁) T) + 2 * x ^ (1 - σ₁) * (1 - x ^ (-(σ₂ - σ₁) / N)) * ∑ n in Finset.Ico 1 N, (I.B₀ (σn σ₁ σ₂ n N) (Hn I.H₀ I.R σ₁ σ₂ n N) T) * x ^ ((σ₂ - σ₁) * (n + 1) / N) := by
      sorry
    linarith
  exact h_main
